final:
module temperature_comparator (
    input [3:0] obf_A,
    input [3:0] B,
    output reg [1:0] result
);

always @(*) begin
    if (obf_A < B)
        result = 2'b00; // obf_A < B
    else if (obf_A == B)
        result = 2'b01; // obf_A = B
    else
        result = 2'b10; // obf_A > B
end

endmodule
